reviews.review_description:
Updated Review:
After 2 Months of waiting, the Dev released a Fix. Thx for that. 
Now it "works" , but man, i wish it didn't. 
This absolutely takes the Cake on being the worst Game i own on Quest. Out of over 400 Games i paid for. 
Nothing in this works how you expect it to. 
Bullets going everywhere, just not where you aim at. 
Enemies seem to use Wall-hacks. 
The Music sounds like somebody constantly hit their Cat on an already broken Casio Keyboard. Jawdroppingly bad Game. Sorry.

Old Review:
Can't look around. View is fixed and messed up. Playing on Quest 3.

To the Dev: I've sent you an E-Mail like you wanted, still no answer......

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestions, we are a small independent team and we try to do good work, but we think that a $ 2 game does not deserve a star, of course it is up to you. Do not doubt that we will produce better products by taking your suggestions into account.

reviews.review_description: This game is great in terms of action and challenge, but it would be much better if you could fix the issue with the aim going off target. I'm looking forward to seeing this improvement from you.
The combat is quite enjoyable for the price. Perhaps you could consider changing the appearance of the enemies.
